title: The Blockhead in the Professor's Chair
overview: Class 2-A meets its new teacher, who turns out to be a 10-year-old boy from Wales.

title: Every Beginning is Difficult
overview: Asuna blackmails Negi to help her woo Professor Takahata; the class throws Negi a welcome party.

title: Lovers, Lunatics
overview: Negi makes Asuna a love potion that goes horribly wrong.

title: No Place is like Home
overview: Negi continues to attempt to help Asuna get higher grades.

title: Rumor Flies
overview: Chamo arrives at Mahora Academy intent on finding Negi a Pactio partner.

title: Between a Rock and a Hard Place
overview: Evangeline starts her rampage against Negi.

title: The Appearances of Things Are Deceptive
overview: Negi learns ninja skills from Kaede.

title: One Night Befalls All of Us
overview: Evangeline challenges Negi to a battle; Chachamaru prevents Negi from winning.

title: I'll Get You, Wascally Wabbit!
overview: Negi sets out to run an errand for the Dean with the Narutaki twins as his escorts.

title: Where There Is Harmony, There Is Victory
overview: Class 2-A battles in a dodgeball match against some girls who are also smitten by Negi's looks.

title: When They Are Silent, They Are Shouting
overview: The girls create a homepage for Class 2-A on Negi's new laptop computer.

title: Either Learn or Leave
overview: Negi and the Baka Rangers explore Library Island's basements for a magical book that will make the class dunces smarter for exams.

title: We Live and Learn
overview: A stone golem traps the Dummy Force on Library Island.

title: I Hope the Memory of Our Friendship Will Be Eternal
overview: A love potion mix-up leads to a misunderstanding.

title: A Reliable Friend is Perceived in an Uncertain Situation
overview: Class 2-A visits Ayaka's mansion; Negi learns that all is not what it seems between Asuna and Ayaka.

title: Love and a Cough are Not Kept Secret
overview: Several of Negi's students hold a pillow fight in Mahora's old elementary school building.

title: Nothing is Difficult for a Lover
overview: Yue gives amusement park tickets to Nodoka and Negi.

title: Love Does Not Recognize Rank
overview: Asuna contemplates confronting Takahata following Nodoka's confession.

title: Words Fly Away, Those Written Remain
overview: Kazumi investigates a classmate named Sayo Aisaka.

title: Unless You Have Believed, You Will Not Understand
overview: A class trip to Kyoto turns into a hostage situation.

title: It Must Not at All be Despaired
overview: After a tumultuous first day in Kyoto, Negi, Asuna and Setsuna accompany Konoka back to her home.

title: It is Difficult to Make a Joke with a Sad Mind
overview: Konoka and Setsuna reestablish their childhood friendship; Negi hones his magic skills with help from Evangeline.

title: Remember to Die
overview: On Asuna's last day she searches for an answer.

title: Both Weapons and Words Wound
overview: Negi does his best to lift class 2-A's spirits with preparations for the Cultural Festival.

title: Death is Certain, the Time is Uncertain
overview: Class 2-A scurries to get ready for their musical; Negi tries to bring Asuna back to life.

title: Not for Me, Not for You, But for Us
overview: Evangeline is forced to divulge the magical truth to the entire class.
